title: POLICY RECOMMENDATIONS
subtitle: ‘Farmers at a Crossroads’ (Belgium)
description: A set of policy recommendations from the FARMWELL project for the ‘Farmers at a Crossroads’ case study in Belgium. It outlines challenges in farmers’ help-seeking behaviour, proposes interventions to optimise helpline services, improve access to support, enhance training on mental health communication, and address root causes of stress through collaboration between agricultural and wellbeing sectors.
